product: Google Gemini 3.5 Flash now available as a Databricks-hosted model
tagline: Model Serving now supports Google Gemini 3.5 Flash as a Databricks hosted model.
what_it_does: Model Serving now supports Google Gemini 3.5 Flash as a Databricks hosted model. You can access this model using Foundation Model APIs. Customers are responsible for ensuring their compliance with applicable terms.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Model Serving now supports Google Gemini 3.5 Flash as a Databricks hosted model. You can access this model using Foundation Model APIs.
key_takeaway: Model Serving now supports Google Gemini 3.5 Flash as a Databricks hosted model.
